metadata.name: Lance Hedrick Single Pour
metadata.author: Lance Hedrick
metadata.description: Long bloom with wet WDT to fully saturate grounds, then one continuous pour. High extraction with minimal fines migration.

protocol.notes: Pour 60g (3× dose) to saturate all grounds evenly
Wet WDT — stir through the grounds with a WDT tool or chopstick to break all dry pockets
Single continuous centre pour to 340g — maintain height for turbulence. After draining, swirl if slow / wet WDT if somewhat quick / turn bed with spoon if draining fast.
